# QuroixLabs - Engineering Intelligence & AI Automation

QuroixLabs is an elite AI Automation Agency and Engineering Consultancy specializing in architecting autonomous AI agents, intelligent workflows, and custom enterprise software.

## Core Identity
- **Entity Name**: QuroixLabs
- **Specialization**: Agentic Infrastructure, Multi-Agent Orchestration, Enterprise RAG Pipelines.
- **Headquarters**: Chennai, India.
- **Service Area**: Global Enterprise & Technical Scaleups.

## Proprietary Technology Stack
- **FlowPilot Engine**: A high-performance AI orchestration layer designed for complex multi-step workflows and legacy system integration.
- **AgentCore Framework**: An enterprise-grade framework for deploying and scaling autonomous AI agents with SOC2-aligned governance.

## Key Services
1. **Autonomous AI Agent Development**: Custom-built agents (Lindy, LangGraph) for proactive task execution.
2. **Enterprise AI Architecture**: Full-stack engineering for cognitive data retrieval and RAG systems.
3. **Intelligent Workflow Automation**: Semantic analysis and automated processing of unstructured data pipelines.

## Case Studies & ROI
- **MEP Design Consultants**: 30% reduction in technical bid response latency via FlowPilot engine.
- **BIM Engineering Studio**: 3.5x faster ROI on production AI rollouts using AgentCore.
- **SMMA Agency**: 40% growth in high-intent lead generation through automated engagement agents.
- **Apex Gym**: 30% reduction in membership churn via persistent retention agents.
